# Transcrição: 1. The Gameplan

- **Fonte:** 1. The Gameplan
- **Duração:** 01:40
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:40]

Welcome to the incubator. I am your host and mentor Cat Howell and I am extremely honored and excited that you have included me as a part of your journey towards building your freelancing or agency business. Now here's how this is going to go down. You're going to have eight weeks to work directly with my team to help you work through the strategies that we're going to share with you. The name of the game is that you position yourself in a way where you are able to attract the right types of leads and clients into your business. So what I'm looking for at the end of eight weeks is that you have a pipeline, a prospecting pipeline setup that is generating leads for yourself. Now what I'm going to be showing you is different prospecting strategies based off your strengths and your weaknesses. We're also going to be looking at automating all of those prospecting strategies through online funnels and then we're really going to dig deep in terms of how you position yourself and talk to your ideal avatar. That's all around niching and positioning and looking at your pricing and the documents that you're going to need to build in efficiencies to really help you get past the bottleneck that has brought you here to me today and that is the inability to get leads and clients for yourself. So how do you say next eight weeks we get rid of that and we move on to the next stage of your business which will be hiring teams building out production schedules and all of that good stuff and lock out this pipeline for your business. Let's get into it.
